name: The Face Place
tagline: Sebastopol's boutique skin care studio for over 15 years
seoDescription: The Face Place is a boutique skin care studio in the heart of Sebastopol: results-driven facials, expert brows, waxing, and lash services from estheticians

sections.heading: Skin Care in the Heart of Sebastopol

sections.heading: About The Face Place
body: The Face Place is a boutique skin care studio in the heart of Sebastopol, offering the very best in facials, waxing, brows, lashes, and beauty. For more than fifteen years it has been a trusted name for results-driven skin care, the kind of place clients return to for over a decade.

The team includes estheticians like Sebastopol-raised Ashley Baldwin, who grew up in her mom's longtime local salon and has practiced since 2002, and Meghan, who makes waxing comfortable and accessible for every body. Reviewers describe true pros who learn each client's preferences and keep them coming back.

items.title: Facials
items.description: Results-driven facials tailored to your skin, from a team trained in real skin care.

items.title: Brows & Lashes
items.description: Expert brow shaping and lash services, a longtime client favorite.

items.title: Waxing
items.description: Comfortable, accessible waxing for every body.

items.title: Skin Care & Beauty
items.description: A boutique studio for all of your skin care and beauty needs.
